    uma: Never pass cache zones to memguard

    Items allocated from cache zones cannot usefully be protected by
    memguard.

    PR:             267151
    Reported and tested by: pho

    (cherry picked from commit 2dba2288aa364c36c756770ac77590816b15d954)
